seo.title: Laser Light Shows — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox designs and operates professional laser light shows for concerts, festivals, and experiential events — custom beam choreography, sky scanning, and laser mapping.

og.title: Laser Light Shows — BEATROX
og.description: Professional laser systems choreographed to your music and brand — sky scanning, beam effects, and laser mapping for concerts and festivals.

hero.headline: Laser Light Shows
hero.subheadline: High-powered laser systems choreographed to your music and brand — cutting through the dark with precision and impact.

body.content: Few effects command an audience's attention like a precisely choreographed laser show. Beatrox designs and operates professional laser systems for concerts, festivals, brand activations, and large-scale experiential events — from tight venue beam effects to massive outdoor sky scans.

body.heading: Why Choose Beatrox
items: 15+ years of experience in live event production
Full-service team from design to strike
Trusted by Adidas, Netflix, CNN, Amazon Music

body.heading: Our Process
items: 1. Discovery Call — We learn your vision, venue, and budget
2. Design & Pre-Visualization — See your event before it happens
3. Equipment & Crew — We source everything and assign the right team
4. On-Site Execution — Professional setup, operation, and strike
5. Post-Event Review — We ensure everything exceeded expectations

body.heading: Custom Laser Production
body.content: Our laser shows are fully custom-programmed to your event's music, timing, and creative vision. We handle all pre-visualization and programming in advance, with live operation on event day. Beatrox is experienced in integrating laser with LED video walls, projection mapping, and drone light shows for unified multi-system spectacles.

body.heading: Safety & Compliance
body.content: Safety is non-negotiable in laser production. Beatrox operates in full compliance with ANSI Z136 standards for safe laser use. We handle variance permitting through the FDA/CDRH, coordinate with local authorities for outdoor shows, and provide certified laser safety officers on every production. All beam paths are calculated to audience-safe zones, and atmospheric monitoring ensures safe operation even in variable conditions.

body.heading: Music Sync Options
body.content: Beatrox laser shows can be programmed to any audio source — from prerecorded tracks with frame-accurate BPM timing to live, improvised performance. Our programmers build cues locked to beat grids for seamless sync with DJ sets and live bands. For live shows, our operators can improvise in real time, following the energy of the room and the artist's performance. We also integrate with timecode, MIDI, and Ableton Link for synchronized multi-system shows.

body.heading: System Options
items: Sky scan, fan beam, aerial, and surface mapping modes

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking at least 4–6 weeks in advance for standard rentals and 8–12 weeks for custom productions. Last-minute requests are often accommodated depending on availability.

items.question: Do you travel outside Portland?
items.answer: Absolutely. While we're headquartered in Portland, OR, we regularly serve clients across the West Coast and nationwide for touring and large-scale events.

items.question: What's included in the rental?
items.answer: Every rental includes delivery, setup, on-site technical support, and strike. Custom packages can also include content design, pre-visualization, and dedicated project management.

items.question: Do I need a permit for a laser show?
items.answer: Most laser shows require a variance permit from the FDA/CDRH. We handle all permitting paperwork, including coordination with local authorities for outdoor shows. Indoor shows may also require venue-specific approvals.

items.question: Can lasers be used outdoors?
items.answer: Yes. Our systems are rated for outdoor use with weather-resistant enclosures. We coordinate with the FAA for sky-scanning shows and provide certified laser safety officers for all outdoor productions.
